name: token-watchdog
description: Pre-trade safety layer for AI agents — 9-dimensional composite risk analysis on any token before buying. Use when: checking if a token is safe, analyzing token risk, scanning for rug pulls, safe-buying tokens, finding safe trending tokens. Triggers: 'is this token safe to buy', 'check token risk', 'rug pull check', 'scan token safety', 'safe buy', 'watch trending tokens', 'token risk score', 'should I buy this token', 'pre-trade safety check'. Composes okx-security, okx-dex-trenches, okx-dex-token, okx-dex-market, okx-dex-swap, okx-dex-signal.
author: tokenwatchdog
